column1: I think we'll be able to_____________you with the money you need.
I've known James all my life and can say he has always been a___________liar.
They demanded an immediate_________as they couldn't move further without it.
The work was____________and not interesting at all but it had to be done.
I'm not sure Vicky was a willing___________in this affair.
Allan has always been a_____________and disapproved of the accepted ways of doing things.
